name: api-first
description: API-First: schema before client/server, schema versioning, backward compatibility policy.

rules.guidance: API schema (OpenAPI/protobuf/GraphQL SDL) is the source of truth. Client and server code is generated from or validated against the schema — never the reverse.
API schemas are versioned (semver or date-based). The version is part of the base path or package name. Changelogs document breaking vs. additive changes per version.
New fields are optional with defaults. Removing or renaming fields is a breaking change requiring a major version. Deprecation annotations precede removal by at least one release.
Provide a mock server or contract stubs from the schema so consumer teams can develop against the API before the server is implemented.
